title: Las Vegas Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Las Vegas with a Z-Score of +3.06. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Las Vegas is at a CRITICAL level, with 0.0 HDD and 9.7 CDD. 
 The humidity is at 9%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is 13.0 km/h. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with no signs of relief in the near future.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
